candidates.why: Represents the company’s primary sales/top-line revenue; more specific than aggregate 'Total revenues and other income' which includes non-operating items.
Label suggests core revenue but preview values are empty and 'Revenues' already clearly captures sales; using 'Revenues' instead.
This is an operating expense, not revenue; therefore not suitable for REVT.
Includes other income beyond core sales; less precise than 'Revenues' for top-line sales.

candidates.row_label: Changes in fair value of derivatives, negative  (revenue/other income adj.)
candidates.why: Adjustment item, not total revenue.

candidates.row_label: Changes in fair value of derivatives, positive  (revenue/other income adj.)
candidates.why: Adjustment item, not total revenue.

candidates.row_label: Loss on sale of assets (revenue/other income adj.)
candidates.why: Non-core adjustment related to asset sales, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Chosen as primary top-line sales figure; matches total revenues and other income numerically but excludes other income conceptually.

candidates.why: Adjustment related to inventory movement; may be part of COGS calculation but not itself labeled as cost of sales.
Explicitly labeled as COGS/cost of sales; directly matches target definition.
Balance sheet inventory component, not an income statement expense.
Broad operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A-type expense excluding COGS and D&A.
Classic SG&A component (selling and admin). Contains non-production overhead.
Explicit SG&A line; even if preview is empty, rule says to prefer explicit SG&A labels.
Share-based compensation typically included within SG&A overhead.

candidates.row_label: Gain on sale of assets (operating/administrative expenses)
candidates.why: A component within operating/administrative expenses (likely a contra-expense) but still part of SG&A bucket; allowed as a component line.

final_choice.row_label: Gain on sale of assets (operating/administrative expenses)

variables.notes: Includes all relevant SG&A-related component lines; none are totals or balancing items.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; directly matches XRD definition.
Interest income, opposite sign of interest expense; not appropriate as primary interest expense measure.
Generic label but appears with no values; less specific than 'Interest Expense' and may be redundant.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses and other financial expenses
candidates.why: Includes interest plus other finance costs; if no pure interest expense existed this would be candidate, but 'Interest Expense' is available and more precise.
Interest specifically on lease liabilities; subset of total interest expense.
Direct, explicit total interest expense line; best match for XINT.
Aggregate of interest and finance costs; less precise than 'Interest Expense'.
Allocation of profit to NCI, not interest expense.
Same as above, equity allocation not interest.
Capitalized portion of interest; not the full period expense measure we want for XINT alone.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail for lease interest; subset of total interest expense.
Balance sheet asset, explicitly non-interest-bearing; not an interest expense.
Equity attributable to NCI, not interest.
Equity attributable to NCI, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Net income/(loss) from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: Income from associates, not an equity stock measure.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Net income attributable to shareholders, a flow not a stock of equity.

candidates.row_label: Share of OCI from equity accounted investments
candidates.why: OCI line, not total equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to the equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Same nature as above—income allocation, not book equity balance.
Profits from equity-accounted investments, not equity stock.
Asset representing investments in associates, not the firm’s own equity.

candidates.row_label: Payables to equity accounted companies and other related parties
candidates.why: Liability, not equity.
Represents equity attributable to parent shareholders, excluding NCI; valid book equity measure.
Component of equity related to associates’ OCI, not total equity.
Full book equity including non-controlling interests; acceptable as BE per instructions.

variables.notes: Selected the comprehensive equity figure; instructions allow book equity / total equity / shareholders’ equity.

candidates.why: Income attributable to NCI; flow measure, but clearly identifies the minority interest portion of earnings.
Same income attribution to minorities; duplicate of above in effect.
Balance sheet carrying amount of minority interests in equity; best match for MIB as an equity stock.
Duplicate label for NCI on balance sheet; also valid but redundant with 'Non-controlling interests'.

candidates.row_label: Total Comprehensive Income attributable to Minority Interest
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to NCI; flow not stock.
